[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1705935722707{margin-top: 20px !important;padding-top: 60px !important;padding-bottom: 60px !important;}” el_id=”home-icons-section”][vc_column width=”1/3″ el_class=”gth_home_icon_box”][vc_single_image image=”27705″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center” css=”.vc_custom_1670567026984{margin-bottom: 10px !important;}”][vc_custom_heading text=”50,000+” font_container=”tag:p|text_align:center” use_theme_fonts=”yes” el_class=”gtt_home_sectionOne”][vc_custom_heading text=”Abroad Trips” font_container=”tag:p|text_align:center” use_theme_fonts=”yes” el_class=”gtt_home_sectionOne”][vc_column_text]

For the last decade, ATW Travels have organized more than 50,000 international itineraries.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″ el_class=”gth_home_icon_box”][vc_single_image image=”27723″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center” css=”.vc_custom_1670576622405{margin-bottom: 10px !important;}”][vc_custom_heading text=”Handcrafted” font_container=”tag:p|text_align:center” use_theme_fonts=”yes” el_class=”gtt_home_sectionOne”][vc_custom_heading text=”Experiences” font_container=”tag:p|text_align:center” use_theme_fonts=”yes” el_class=”gtt_home_sectionOne”][vc_column_text]

Each and every itinerary is customized according to the taste of the customers.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″ el_class=”gth_home_icon_box”][vc_single_image image=”27708″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center” css=”.vc_custom_1670567188345{margin-bottom: 10px !important;}”][vc_custom_heading text=”Extremely Happy” font_container=”tag:p|text_align:center” use_theme_fonts=”yes” el_class=”gtt_home_sectionOne”][vc_custom_heading text=”Travellers” font_container=”tag:p|text_align:center” use_theme_fonts=”yes” el_class=”gtt_home_sectionOne”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels holds record of great customer satisfaction and all customers are retained with us.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” content_placement=”middle” row_fullwidth=”yes”][vc_column][vc_single_image image=”21545″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1670399439800{padding-top: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”fs-28 fs-normal”]

Welcome to ATW Travels

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels is a subsidiary of Sangam Group of Hotels, one of the biggest hotel chains in south Tamil Nadu. The Sangam Group of Hotels founded in 1968 has for forty years provided impeccable service and outstanding hospitality. It currently has 19 properties in Tamil Nadu. ATW Travels built on this strong foundation aims to provide great customer satisfaction and an exemplary holiday experience. Planning a once in a lifetime holiday or a yearly corporate retreat? No problem! ATW Travels can get you what you want and in the minimal time. One of the best destination management companies in South India, it has the experience and infrastructure to handle any customer demand. In addition to destination management, ATW Travels also plans corporate tours, incentive trips, college/school excursions, business travel, arranges car/railway & hotel bookings and much, much more.
Discover what makes ATW Travels and its offerings distinct from the rest of the pack and indispensable to its customers.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”fs-28 fs-normal”]

Stress-Free Holidays with GT

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1670399547796{padding-top: 20px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”fs-28 fs-normal”]

GT Group Departures

[/vc_column_text][vc_single_image image=”28921″ img_size=”full” onclick=”custom_link” link=”https://group.atwtravels.com/”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1670400418516{padding-top: 20px !important;padding-bottom: 20px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”fs-28 fs-normal” css=”.vc_custom_1692725664074{margin-bottom: 20px !important;}”]

GT Premium Group Tours

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”group-tour”]

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner css=”.vc_custom_1670400333467{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1670400340249{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_btn title=”Know More” color=”blue” size=”lg” align=”center” link=”url:https%3A%2F%2Fgroup.atwtravels.com%2F|title:Group%20Tour” el_class=”themebtn” css=”.vc_custom_1693241483500{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/3″][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1705935676199{margin-top: 20px !important;margin-bottom: 20px !important;}” el_class=”gth_excl_tab_mob”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”fs-28 fs-normal”]

GT Exclusive Collection

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]GT’s exclusive collection of hotels and resorts are selected carefully and hand picked such that they are unique on their own stay. All these premium properties will deliver the best vacation to the guests.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1670402581511{padding-top: 40px !important;}”][vc_column]

Our Happy Clients

Poornesh Jaganathan

We booked our Maldives trip through "ATW Travels" and spent 4 days and 3 nights at Sheraton Maldives Full Moon Resort & Spa. It was a great memorable experience. Thank you so much Mr.Romario for assisting us right from the beginning and helping us customize the trip. We never had to wait any where, everything was planned perfectly. Looking forward to book more trip with ATW Travels.

Kalky Rajan K

Fist want to thank Associate Priya for helping and planning for entire Maldives trip. She helped us from very beginning to the last day until we board the return flight. The place visited - Kandima Maldives, which is a great escape destination from the Male City. The place was entirely a luxury destination and the experience was unmatchable. Had a memorable stay 😎 I suggest ATW Travels for all sort of vacation planning.

Venkatesan T

I saw ATW Travels through Instagram, they have various tour package option. I choose goa and customized the tour. Kalpana was their person who assisted me through out my trip, suggested me many hotels in goa. Even though it was a busy season and weekend all booking of flights, hotel's, was done hassle free by Kalpana. So my part was only enjoying the trip. With this awesome experience with ATW Travels , next I will try my abroad trip. Thank you.

Kirtana Velavan

We booked our trip to andaman through ATW Travels. It was indeed the best trip for us till date. Mr Kumar had assisted us amazingly right from the starting and also helped us customise the trip as per our need. The hotels and resorts provided was truly awesome. We never had to wait any were, everything was planned perfectly. Special mention to the drivers (Anish and Biswajeet) who were very polite and humble. Over all it was a great experience and we had a wonderful time. Looking forward to book more trip from ATW Travels

Sreesha Subramanian

We planned for a year end trip to Srilanka and it was Miss Kalpana who assisted us. She was very patient and responsive. Showed absolute professionalism. Right from the time we took the flight to the time we landed back, she took care of everything. We simply had to enjoy the trip. Thats it. The trip was for 5nights 6 days and everything was arranged. We did not face any hurdles anywhere. Thankyou for being so responsive and taking up the entire responsibility. I would definitely say a yes to ATW Travels if somebody asks me. Go for it!!!

Vinoth Kumar

We went to Andaman Nicobar recently through ATW Travels. It was one of the splendid experience we ever had. We were guided in a well good manner to reach our hotels and tourist spots that we didn't feel like away from home. We had the best journey also by cruise to islands. Overall we enjoyed thoroughly. Thank you ATW Travels.

KP Akash

We planned a trip to andamons and ATW Travels were the best who made the holidays far better than we expected. we were given enough care and always looked after our needs .The hotels and restaurant they arranged was quite good.especially the food, they even gave care to vegans. The best part is that we never felt that we were wasting any time everything was well planned and scheduled.Andamon is also the best place to explore ❤️

Karthik Aiyandra

Our representative miss Ayesha from GT took entire ownership of suggesting,planning and executing my trip. It was great experience as everything was taken care by ATW Travels and we had great time during vacation. 5star experience and Eagerly waiting to plan my next vacation with them 😊

Aravind Raj

I would like to thank you ATW Travels for making my honeymoon trip to maldives so memorable and hassle free travel. Special thanks to Mr Hariharan from ATW Travels, India. He was very kind, friendly, helpful, knowledgeable and very much quick in response. He made all the arrangements from the scratch and was following us throughtout the trip until we reach back. One of the best travel management service. I would recommend ATW Travels to everyone. In future i would definitely go to ATW Travels for any hassle free international/domestic trips.

Gnana Sagar

We went to Andaman last week. We had booked for 3N/4D package. thanks to Mr.Kumar for organizing an amazing trip which will be cherished forever. Everything was taken care properly. Flights, Resort, Transfer and other documents, all are arranged properly. Overall great service.

Rojin Varghese

Adams at ATW Travels Private Limited helped to plan our honeymoon.The Service was absolutely fantastic! He helped us pick out the honeymoon we dreamed off and was always available for our questions. Highly recommend using Adams to book your next vacation if you want an easy, stress-free vacation!

Balamurugan Kalyanasundaram

I visited Shimla with their package. It was my first travel with my son. So, i was cautious and wanted to chose the right travel company. After watching the GT travels Karthik video in YouTube, i decided to choose them. Overall, i was very happy with the accommodation and other services offered in the package. Special thanks to Sathish who was patiently responding to my queries and booked one of the best resorts in Kufri for our stay.

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1670402924525{margin-top: 40px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”fs-28 fs-normal”]
